name: groundstation
description: Earth observation tools for AI agents, from Development Seed labs

plugins.name: groundstation
plugins.description: Earth data, agent-ready: STAC search across Earth Search/VEDA/Planetary Computer, TiTiler previews and band math, date comparisons, shareable maps, events and weather — as MCP tools plus an earth-data skill. Requires uv (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/).
